creator: me@niklaas.eu
text:
Kurt, thanks. I don't have the resources to testport on current, but I testported on 10.2 and it's fine. Testport on 9.3 is just running, but it should be fine too.

It's one of the first ports I made, so I guess you're much more experienced, but I noticed two things:

1. You omitted LICENSE_FILE. Is this for some reason?
2. You also removed the strip command, so I get a warning in stage-qa.

In case that's all right, please shortly comment why. For me to learn for the next port.

Thanks for correcting the other minor issues in the Makefile.
